changeSet.author: MohamedFouad
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE price_list_item (
id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
price_list_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
product_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
uom_id BIGINT,
min_qty NUMERIC(18,4) DEFAULT 0,
price NUMERIC(18,4),
discount NUMERIC(10,2),
start_date DATE, end_date DATE,
CONSTRAINT fk_price_list FOREIGN KEY (price_list_id) REFERENCES price_list(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
CONSTRAINT fk_price_product FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES product(id),
CONSTRAINT fk_price_uom FOREIGN KEY (uom_id) REFERENCES uom(id) );
